text: Flood water crossed the old bridge near Village A. Around 70 people are stranded, including elderly residents and children.
Boat Team 2 is available near Village A with fuel for four trips. Low-lying river road is blocked.
Shelter C has 140 spaces and separate area for families with children.
Ambulance Unit 4 can stage near the north school road checkpoint.
Rainfall is intensifying upstream. Reassess water level every 30 minutes.
